title: AC #7 (.prompt.txt / /spec --auto) is untestable and undecided — false signal of completeness
body: Two reviewers independently flagged that AC #7 requires /spec --auto which doesn't exist. The plan defers it but it remains in the acceptance criteria. Either formally descope to Phase 2 or add a task.

title: max_api_calls counter violates spec's explicit cost-ceiling removal
body: The spec explicitly removed the cost ceiling as a user decision. The plan reintroduces it as max_api_calls without reopening the spec decision. Remove it.

title: Codex fix-attempt mechanics are unspecified — task 10c cannot be built correctly
body: The spec says 'one autonomous fix attempt + re-test' but the plan leaves the implementation undefined: what prompt, what context, what handles fix-attempt failure. This is enough implementation surface to be a blocking unknown.

title: Remote branch + PR not cleaned up on rollback — local git reset --hard is insufficient
body: git reset --hard is local-only. If wave N pushes to autorun/<slug> and opens a PR before test failure, the remote branch and PR remain. Need gh pr close + git push origin --delete in the failure path.

title: AC #4 (STOP kill-switch 'clean halt') has no verification definition
body: Two reviewers flagged: 'no dirty branch state' is untestable without a definition. Need a checklist: git status clean, state.json stage matches last completed wave, no orphaned branches.

title: AC #5 (retry+rollback) has no test mechanism — rollback logic will ship untested
body: test_cmd='' skips tests entirely. No documented way to force test failure. test_cmd='exit 1' is the simple mechanism; must be noted in plan and autorun.md.

title: Task 3 (notify.sh) dependency wrong — schemas not locked until task 9
body: notify.sh reads failure.md/run-summary.md schemas that are defined in task 9 (build.sh) and task 10 (run.sh). Implementing task 3 before schemas are locked guarantees a rework pass. Change task 3 dep from 1 to 9.

title: Task 7 (plan.sh) must wait for task 6 (risk-analysis.sh) at runtime
body: plan.sh reads merged review-findings.md which includes risk output. At runtime, run.sh must merge risk-findings.md into review-findings.md BEFORE calling plan.sh. Task 7 cannot run parallel with task 6.

title: Task 10 is XL not L — split into 10a/10b/10c for testability
body: Task 10 bundles 12+ behavioral units. Split: 10a=orchestrator core, 10b=PR+provenance, 10c=Codex+fix+merge. This matches natural failure boundaries and makes each piece incrementally testable.

title: pre-build SHA write-once semantics not stated — retry loops may overwrite rollback target
body: The plan must explicitly state: pre-build-sha.txt is captured once at Stage 4 entry and never overwritten. All retries roll back to this same SHA. Retry 2 and 3 must not re-capture.

title: AUTORUN_DRY_RUN=1 missing — every integration test invokes real claude -p calls
body: A dry-run mode that stubs stage scripts to exit 0 would let tasks 6-10's wiring be smoke-tested without API cost. Highest-leverage missing testability feature.

title: Mid-crash orphan cleanup path not specified for remote branch
body: When orphan state is detected (stale PID), run.sh must delete or reset the autorun/<slug> remote branch before re-entering Stage 1. Partial commits on a stale branch disagree with the fresh spec-review context.
